title: Nuclear Extraction from Human Heart Tissue for Single Cell Sequencing
author: Christian Pfleger
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.bcjqiumw

steps.title: Put on dry ice
steps.instruction: Put on dry ice: flat bottom mortar and pestle, hammer and foreceps sample-flash frozen heart tissue scale plate

steps.title: Pulverize tissue in mortar using pestle and hammer
steps.instruction: Pulverize tissue in mortar using pestle and hammer.

steps.title: Transfer pulversized tissue in 6 cm...
steps.instruction: Transfer pulversized tissue in 6 cm dish containing 4 mL, cell lysis buffer On ice .

steps.title: Assemble scale and cover plate with weighing paper
steps.instruction: Assemble scale and cover plate with weighing paper.

steps.title: Weigh 300 mg tissue
steps.instruction: Weigh 300 mg tissue.

steps.title: Transfer tissue immediately into mortar and cover with pestle
steps.instruction: Transfer tissue immediately into mortar and cover with pestle.

steps.title: Hammer gently, scrape off tissue stuck to pistill
steps.instruction: Hammer gently, scrape off tissue stuck to pistill.

steps.title: Start timer
steps.instruction: Start timer.

steps.title: Hammer again 3-6 x
steps.instruction: Hammer again 3-6 x.

steps.title: Segregate particles and transfer into douncer A with transfer pipette
steps.instruction: Segregate particles and transfer into douncer A with transfer pipette.

steps.title: Wash plate with 2 mL, cell...
steps.instruction: Wash plate with 2 mL, cell lysis buffer and transfer into douncer A .

steps.title: Dounce carefully 30x
steps.instruction: Dounce carefully 30x .

steps.title: Filter through 100 µm mesh in 50 ml Falcon tube
steps.instruction: Filter through 100 µm mesh in 50 ml Falcon tube.

steps.title: Wash douncer A with 2 mL,...
steps.instruction: Wash douncer A with 2 mL, cell lysis buffer and filter as well.

steps.title: Keep 10 µL for QC #1
steps.instruction: Keep 10 µL for QC #1.

steps.title: Transfer into douncer B
steps.instruction: Transfer into douncer B .

steps.title: Dounce 20x
steps.instruction: Dounce 20x .

steps.title: Filter through 40 µm mesh in 50 ml Falcon tube
steps.instruction: Filter through 40 µm mesh in 50 ml Falcon tube.

steps.title: Wash douncer B with 2 mL,...
steps.instruction: Wash douncer B with 2 mL, cell lysis buffer and filter as well.

steps.title: Transfer into 15 ml Falcon tube
steps.instruction: Transfer into 15 ml Falcon tube.

steps.title: Take time
steps.instruction: Take time: should take 00:10:00 .

steps.title: Spin 400 x g, 4 °C, 7 minutes
steps.instruction: Spin 400 x g, 4 °C, 7 minutes .

steps.title: Aspirate supernatant
steps.instruction: Aspirate supernatant.

steps.title: During testing, collect all 3 phases...
steps.instruction: During testing, collect all 3 phases of Optiprep centrifugation, add same volume of nuclear buffer and spin to check for quality and quantity of seperation of nuclei and cell debris. Adjustments may be required. Resupend pellet in 600 µL, homogenization buffer (D) .

steps.title: Add 1 mL, Optiprep working solution...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL, Optiprep working solution and mix carefully (C) - 30 % iodixanol.

steps.title: Keep 10 µL for QC #2
steps.instruction: Keep 10 µL for QC #2.

steps.title: Transfer into centrifugation tube (40ml)
steps.instruction: Transfer into centrifugation tube (40ml).

steps.title: Underlayer carefully nuclear sample with 8...
steps.instruction: Underlayer carefully nuclear sample with 8 mL 35 %, iodixanol using serological pipette.

steps.title: Underlayer carefully both layers with 4 mL 40 %, iodixanol
steps.instruction: Underlayer carefully both layers with 4 mL 40 %, iodixanol .

steps.title: Centrifuge at 8
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at 8.000 x g, 4 °C, 20 minutes ; no breaks.

steps.title: Collect ring of nuclei at 35...
steps.instruction: Collect ring of nuclei at 35 % - 40 % iodixanol interface.

steps.title: Add same volume of nuclear buffer
steps.instruction: Add same volume of nuclear buffer .

steps.title: Spin at 500 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes
steps.instruction: Spin at 500 x g, 4 °C, 10 minutes .

steps.title: Aspirate carefully and resuspend in nuclear buffer
steps.instruction: Aspirate carefully and resuspend in nuclear buffer .

steps.title: Stain 5 µL of sample as...
steps.instruction: Stain 5 µL of sample as well as all fractions of QC with DAPI .

steps.title: Check nuclei for complete lysis, nuclei morphology, purity and count
steps.instruction: Check nuclei for complete lysis, nuclei morphology, purity and count.

steps.title: Resuspend nuclei in 100 µL, nucelar buffer
steps.instruction: Resuspend nuclei in 100 µL, nucelar buffer .

steps.title: Add drop wise 400 µL 100...
steps.instruction: Add drop wise 400 µL 100 % ( -20 °C ) methanol to suspension and transfer into -80 °C .
